prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2021年第52名→2026年第55名，近年排名略有后移，整体处于全国前55名水平，属中上游211；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及图书馆表白墙事件等一般性舆情；抖音综合热度排名第102位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量较低；历史投档异常记录中未见该校明显断档信号；作物学A+、植物保护A+、食品科学与工程A、兽医学A-、畜牧学A-，农林学科实力突出，与招生专业中的农学、植物保护、食品科学与工程类、动物医学类、动物科学等直接对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，该校电子信息类、人工智能、数据科学与大数据技术等专业受益；农林类专业热度一般；广东省2026年物理类考生约456000人，较2025年440208人增加约3.6%，竞争加剧。省控线方面，广东物理类本科批2021年432分→2025年436分，波动较小，未纳入主要判断；南京农业大学位于江苏省南京市，在广东无本地招生倾斜；该校在广东招生人数占全国总招生比例约1.8%–2.0%（2024年约95人/5302人），占比稳定，无明显地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年扩招约7.8%对位次的推后效应、广东省物理类考生增加约3.6%带来的竞争加剧，以及学校声誉中性、抖音热度一般等因素，考虑考生规模增长适度上调，预测2026年物理类最低位次约44544名，区间44044–45044名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 30997 → 34155 → 36384 → 40786 → 42351, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 11354 positions over the past 4 years, averaging about 2839 positions per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 42351; the university's enrollment plan in Guangdong for Physics Category was 81 in 2021, 83 in 2022, 86 in 2023, 91 in 2024, and 102 in 2025, with annual expansion; the 2026 plan is 110, an increase of about 7.8% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, which has a backward effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking from 52nd in 2021 to 55th in 2026, with a slight backward shift in recent years, overall at the level of the top 55 nationally, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving general public opinion such as the library confession wall incident; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 102nd, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure; no obvious signal of admission anomalies in historical records; Crop Science A+, Plant Protection A+, Food Science and Engineering A, Veterinary Medicine A-, Animal Science A-, with outstanding strength in agriculture and forestry disciplines, directly corresponding to majors such as Agronomy, Plant Protection, Food Science and Engineering, Veterinary Medicine, and Animal Science in the enrollment.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have consistently high social popularity, benefiting majors like Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence, and Data Science and Big Data Technology at this university; agriculture and forestry majors have average popularity; the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong in 2026 is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 440,208 in 2025, intensifying competition. Regarding provincial control lines, the Guangdong Physics Category undergraduate batch was 432 points in 2021 → 436 points in 2025, with small fluctuations, not included in the main judgment; Nanjing Agricultural University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, with no local enrollment preference in Guangdong; the proportion of the university's enrollment in Guangdong to the total national enrollment is about 1.8%–2.0% (approximately 95 out of 5,302 in 2024), with a stable proportion and no obvious regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the backward effect of the 2026 expansion of about 7.8% on rankings, the intensified competition due to an increase of about 3.6% in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong, and factors such as neutral university reputation and average Douyin popularity, with a moderate upward adjustment for candidate scale growth, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 44,544, with a range of 44,044–45,044.
